\maketitle \chapter*{Note To The Reader} \pagenumbering{roman} This document has been compiled by the Technical and Computing Services Instructional Support Staff as an introduction to the UNIX\/\TM operating system and the EECS Instructional Fac

TM operating system and the EECS Instructional Facilities. Because resources change periodically, the manual is also evolving and will continue to be revised. We have attempted to ensure that the information is accurate, but errors can slip through

formation is accurate, but errors can slip through. We would be delighted if you would help us improve this document by reporting any errors or inconsistencies that you find to the EECS Instructional Group, 386~Cory Hall or send e-mail to {\tt error
